{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = The Final Solution
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Final Solution]] is a ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
